'''Bay 3''' was the designation of the [[Hangar/Legends|hangar]] bay where [[Dash Rendar/Legends|Dash Rendar's]] [[Outrider/Legends|''Outrider'']] was kept at [[Echo Base/Legends|Echo Base]] around the time of the [[Battle of Hoth/Legends|Battle of Hoth]]. After the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] base's generator was taken down and [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]], [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa]] and [[Chewbacca/Legends|Chewbacca]] escaped in the [[Millennium Falcon/Legends|''Millennium Falcon'']], Dash had to find a way to escape and open the bay door.
